GlobalConfig.Name: Test_053
GlobalConfig.Note: Copy of Test_052 with DrawBackgroundOnce set to false (independent-frame mode) instead of true (accumulation mode) — Test_052 is accumulation-mode only, so any test needing the fresh-frame/makeFreshFrame code path (e.g. transparentBackground) needs this fixture instead. Otherwise identical to Test_052 — see its own Note for scene contents.
